headline.text: Neta Holtzman posted in זירת התעסוקה בתעשייה ובהייטק ובחברות סטארטאפ: 🚀 Join NextSilicon and help build the future of high-performance computing and AI infrastructure. We’re looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer to work on large-scale on-prem environments, Linux infrastructure, Kubernetes clusters, and highly automated Jenkins-based CI/CD systems in one of the most innovative deep-tech companies in the industry. ⭐ If you’re excited about complex infrastructure challenges, cutting-edge technology, and making real impact at scale, we’d love to connect 😊 https://lnkd.in/dFpa_2iM #DevOps #SeniorDevOps #Kubernetes #Linux #Jenkins #OnPrem #HPC #AIInfrastructure #DeepTech #Hiring #TechJobs #NextSilicon
